era: Punk Pop. E=6 -- bright, fast, hook-driven, feminist. Palindrome name. Hardly Art streak 3/4. v1.49.344.

location.formative: Capitol Hill punk pop scene. Feminist music network. Hardly Art community.
location.career: Tacocat. 2007-present. Hardly Art. Punk pop. Palindrome feminism.

members.name: Emily Nokes
members.note: Bright, clear, conversational-to-shouted. Feminist lyrics. Humor as vehicle.

members.name: Eric Randall
members.note: Fast power chords. Bright distortion. Punk rhythm guitar.

members.name: Bree McKenna
members.note: Fast driving bass. Also in Childbirth (204). Network node.

members.name: Lelah Maupin
members.note: Fast, driving, punk tempos. Energy through speed.

associated_musicians.name: Childbirth
associated_musicians.note: Supergroup featuring Bree McKenna. Hardly Art (204). Direct member overlap.

associated_musicians.name: Chastity Belt
associated_musicians.note: Hardly Art labelmate (201). Members overlap via Childbirth. Network triangle.

theory_nodes.concept: Humor as political vehicle -- Tacocat uses humor to deliver feminist politics. Laugh first, think second. The point lands because the delivery disarms. Distinct from Chastity Belt's irony.
examples: Crimson Wave: menstruation. Catchy punk anthem.
Men Explain Things to Me: mansplaining (after Solnit).
The subjects are political. The delivery is pop.
theory_nodes.description: Humor as political vehicle. Feminist punk pop. Laugh then think.

genealogy.relationship: Tacocat at 203. Humor-first feminist punk pop.

theory_nodes.concept: Hardly Art energy ascent -- E=4 (201) to E=5 (202) to E=6 (203). The streak climbs. Three genres, one direction. Label range fully visible.
theory_nodes.description: Hardly Art energy ascent. E=4 to E=6 across three genres.

genealogy.relationship: Tacocat at 203. Peak energy in the streak.

theory_nodes.concept: Member overlap network -- Tacocat's McKenna in Childbirth (204). Chastity Belt members in Childbirth too. Triangle: 201-203-204. People, not just proximity.
theory_nodes.description: Member overlap network. Capitol Hill triangle. Shared DNA across bands.

genealogy.relationship: Tacocat at 203. Central node in overlap network.

cross_references.relationship: Hardly Art 1/4. Ironic deadpan (E=4) to open humor (E=6). Two feminist delivery modes.
Hardly Art 2/4. Surf reverb to punk distortion. E=5 to E=6.
Hardly Art 4/4. Supergroup with Tacocat's McKenna. Member overlap made explicit.
Historical punk lineage. Fastbacks (1979) to Tacocat (2007). 28 years of Capitol Hill punk.
